tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: I keep getting headaches when I study.
Y: _________
options: A) If I were you, I'd get my eyes tested.
B) If I was you, I'll get my eyes tested.
C) If I am you, I'd get my eyes tested.

items.stem:
X: I'm not sure whether to take the job offer in Berlin.
Y: _________
options: A) You'd better to think it over carefully.
B) You'd better think it over carefully.
C) You'd better thinking it over carefully.

items.stem:
X: My neighbour plays loud music every night. What should I do?
Y: _________
options: A) Why don't you have a word with him about it?
B) Why you don't have a word with him about it?
C) Why not you have a word with him about it?

items.stem:
X: I've been feeling really run-down lately.
Y: _________
options: A) You should have taken up a sport.
B) You should take up a sport.
C) You should to take up a sport.

items.stem:
X: I wish I hadn't spent all my savings on that car.
Y: _________
options: A) There's no point in crying over spilt milk.
B) There's no point to cry over spilt milk.
C) There's no point of crying over spilt milk.

items.stem:
X: I'm thinking of confronting my boss about the unfair schedule.
Y: _________
options: A) I wouldn't do that if I'd be you.
B) I wouldn't do that if I were you.
C) I won't do that if I were you.
